mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 6.0 percent, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, boosting corporate revenue expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day forward returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE crosses below 6.0, or the signal shows no predictive power after controlling for FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real GDP and new housing starts signals broad-based economic expansion, which increases aggregate corporate cash flows and equity risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark in at least two consecutive rolling 3-year periods, or the interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A rising industrial production index indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and supply chain normalization, which lowers input cost inflation and supports corporate margins, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns turn negative when INDPRO rises for three consecutive months, or the signal's directional accuracy drops below 45% in a 10-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: When the annualized growth rate of CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5 percent, persistent inflation forces the Federal Reserve to tighten policy, increasing discount rates and compressing equity valuations, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The market prices in inflation expectations such that SPX forward returns remain positive despite CPI exceeding the threshold, or the signal's information coefficient falls below 0.02 over a 5-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS values indicate strengthening consumer liquidity and wealth effects, which directly support equity demand and generate positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 5-day horizon.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are uncorrelated with RSAFS momentum, or the signal produces false buy signals in more than 60% of bear market episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising nonfarm payrolls and a stable or falling unemployment rate confirms structural labor market healing rather than temporary job creation, which sustains consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields a negative coefficient during periods of rising payrolls, or the combined signal fails to predict returns better than a random walk in a 10-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production growth outpaces real GDP growth, supply-side efficiency gains dominate demand-side pressures, reducing inflationary bottlenecks and supporting corporate profit margins, which generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO growth rate exceeds GDPC1 growth rate
failure_condition: SPX forward returns decline when INDPRO outpaces GDPC1 for two consecutive quarters, or the spread signal shows no statistical edge over a 3-year rolling window.
